productDisplayName: Vero Moda Women White & Pink Top
description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsWhite capped sleeve top, floral print, ruffle embellishment at the yoke and sleeves, pleats at the yoke, fabric layering at the hemMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, Vero Moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels.
